name: liminal-agents
description: A CLI surface on the Liminal substrate. Background daemon ingests signals from local sources, bounded agents deliberate on them, and your correction becomes data.
author: Shruti Rajagopal <shruti@theliminalspace.io>

scripts.vault:show: sqlite3 "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Liminal/vault.db" 'SELECT id, timestamp, trigger, user_state FROM deliberations ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;'
